name: team-task-manager
description: MERN Stack Team Task Manager Application

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm start"
scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.start: cd server && npm install && npm start

postinstall: cd client && npm install && npm run build
